content.problem: Multiple document copies caused sync issues and fragmented information access across agents
content.solution: Established ~/.agent/ as single source of truth with automated validation systems
improvements_implemented: Automated symlink health monitoring with detection and repair suggestions
Dynamic skill discovery system supporting kebab-case and camelCase resolution
Version consistency validation with severity-based reporting
Centralized configuration management with multi-source loading
Cross-reference integrity checking with automatic fix capabilities
lessons_learned: Single source of truth principle prevents information fragmentation
Automated validation is essential for cross-agent compatibility
Symlinks solve sandbox limitations while maintaining consistency
Dynamic discovery eliminates hardcoded path dependencies
Version alignment prevents drift between environments
Centralized configs reduce complexity and improve reliability
next_steps: Integrate validation scripts into mandatory RTB workflow
Add continuous monitoring for structural health
Implement self-healing capabilities for common issues
Create standardized templates for new skill development
